specs.title: cp-000: Non-auto-saved versions use a filled dot marker while auto-saved versions use an
cp-001: Every version card renders both Preview and Restore actions
cp-002: Clicking Preview fetches version content and opens a centered overlay modal
cp-003: Version Preview modal body shows raw formatted JSON inside a pre block
cp-004: Clicking Restore first opens a browser confirm about saving current content as a
cp-005: Cancelling the browser confirm leaves restore state idle and does not fetch vers
cp-006: While restore is in progress for a row only that rows button shows a spinner and
cp-007: Successful restore closes the side panel and remounts the editor using a bumped
cp-008: Editor-page Export button is disabled while the page is loading
cp-009: Editor-page Export button is also disabled when there is no editorContent
cp-010: Opening export on editorid shows a centered modal titled Export Manuscript
cp-011: Export dialog default selected format is DOCX
cp-012: Export dialog renders exactly two format cards DOCX and PDF
cp-013: Active export-format card uses brand border and background styling
cp-014: Include page numbers checkbox defaults to checked
cp-015: Double-spaced checkbox defaults to checked
cp-016: Clicking the dark modal backdrop closes the export dialog
cp-017: Cancel closes the export dialog without starting an export
cp-018: Export button label changes from Export to Exporting while an export is running
cp-019: Export button is disabled only while isExporting is true
cp-020: DOCX export generates a download filename that strips punctuation and replaces w
cp-021: PDF export on editorid uses windowprint rather than an API-backed file download
cp-022: Successful exports close the dialog through onClose
cp-023: Export failures are logged to the console and do not render inline validation te
cp-024: studio reads projectId from the query string and coerces it to a number for init
cp-025: studiomodelearn initializes the page in Learn mode on first render
cp-026: Studio left-rail title input is always visible above the WriteLearn mode toggle
cp-027: Studio left-rail title input is controlled by docTitle
cp-028: Studio left-rail WriteLearn toggle uses Write and Learn text buttons inside a sh
cp-029: Write button is visually active by default unless the URL requests learn mode
cp-030: Learn button becomes visually active with emerald styling when selected
cp-031: Project selector is omitted entirely when the user has zero or one project
cp-032: Closed project selector button shows the selected project title or the fallback
cp-033: Clicking outside the project selector closes the dropdown without changing the s
cp-034: Project selector dropdown lists every available project as a button row
